context.projectOverview: Obsidian vault storage layer. Sprints 1-3 DONE (note model+I/O, derived FactStore index, `bober vault reindex` CLI). This sprint (depends only on Sprint 1) adds (1) a config schema VaultSection declaring an on-device Obsidian MCP server mirroring ObservabilityProviderSchema, and (2) a thin VaultMcpAdapter wrapping the EXISTING ExternalMcpServer (src/mcp/external-client.ts) for read/write/list via CONFIGURABLE tool names (default cyanheads/obsidian-mcp-server), with an on-device-only guard that rejects non-local declarations BEFORE any spawn. Independent of the reindex CLI.

note: Do NOT modify src/mcp/external-client.ts — WRAP ExternalMcpServer (inject a minimal { start, listTools, callTool, stop } interface so tests fake it). NEVER log/stringify mcpEnv (mirror external-client.ts:66-77 sanitization). on-device guard MUST run BEFORE start(); on a non-local declaration throw a clear Error and never call start(). Default tool-names target cyanheads/obsidian-mcp-server, overridable in config. Reuse sprint-1 parseNote/serializeNote for VaultNote (de)serialization. Stay on branch bober/medical-team. Use 'npx vitest run'.
